description_long: This is a large, modern luxury yacht with a sleek, elongated hull painted primarily in dark blue and black, accented by wooden deck sections and orange lifeboats along the sides. The vessel features multiple decks, including an upper deck with a control bridge, visible railings, and a spacious open area towards the stern. Two prominent blue and black smokestacks rise from the midsection, and a radar mast with antennas is positioned near the bow. Rows of windows line the hull, suggesting multiple interior cabins and amenities. The bow is sharply pointed, and the stern is squared off, with propellers and rudders visible beneath. The yacht is designed for both comfort and style, with detailed exterior features and a robust, ocean-going profile.
description: A large, modern luxury yacht with a dark blue and black hull, wooden deck accents, orange lifeboats, and multiple decks with visible smokestacks and a radar mast.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, wooden deck accents, and the central control bridge with railings.
description_view_1: Starboard side view displaying the full length of the yacht, rows of windows, orange lifeboats, two smokestacks, and the upper deck layout.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the squared stern, twin propellers, rudders, and the back of the upper deck and smokestacks.
description_view_3: Port side view similar to the starboard, showing the hull windows, lifeboats, smokestacks, and the open upper deck area.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a deep-V profile, sharply pointed bow, squared stern, dark blue and black coloration, and rows of rectangular windows along both sides. Orange lifeboats are mounted externally, and the hull features minimal visible markings.
attribute_deck_layout: Multi-level deck with an upper bridge area near the bow, open walkways along the sides, visible railings, and a spacious aft deck. Two large smokestacks and a radar mast are present, with lifeboats mounted on the main deck.
attribute_cabin_structure: The yacht has a prominent superstructure with multiple rows of rectangular windows indicating several interior cabins. The bridge is enclosed with glass, and there are no visible exterior doors or balconies. The cabin structure is streamlined and integrated into the hull.
